title: PhD
biography: Maurice Hilleman was an American microbiologist who developed more than 40 vaccines, more than any other scientist. His vaccines include those for measles, mumps, hepatitis A, hepatitis B, chickenpox, meningitis, and pneumonia, saving an estimated 8 million lives per year.
aiSummary: Maurice Hilleman is a virology specialist at Merck Research Laboratories. Based in Philadelphia.
techniquesInvented: Over 40 vaccines including measles, mumps, rubella, hepatitis A, hepatitis B, chickenpox
